allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; '\\''{0}  PID={1}  Path={2}'\\'' -f $_.LocalPort, $_.OwningProcess, $p.Path }')
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'Name=\\"node.exe\\"' | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter '\\''Name="cloudflared.exe"'\\'' | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }')

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('sqlite3'\).verbose\(\); const db=new s.Database\('./tuin.db'\); db.serialize\(\(\)=>{ db.run\('DELETE FROM consumos'\); db.run\('DELETE FROM pagamentos', \(\)=>{ console.log\('consumos e pagamentos de teste removidos'\); db.close\(\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('sqlite3'\).verbose\(\); const db=new s.Database\('./tuin.db'\); db.serialize\(\(\)=>{ db.run\('DELETE FROM consumos'\); db.run\('DELETE FROM pagamentos', \(\)=>{ console.log\('banco de teste limpo'\); db.close\(\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('sqlite3'\).verbose\(\); const db=new s.Database\('./tuin.db'\); db.serialize\(\(\)=>{ db.run\('DELETE FROM consumos'\); db.run\('DELETE FROM pagamentos'\); db.run\('DELETE FROM barris'\); db.run\('DELETE FROM movimentacoes_barril'\); db.run\('UPDATE torneiras SET barril_id = NULL', \(\)=>{ console.log\('dados de teste limpos \(comandas, barris, torneiras resetadas\)'\); db.close\(\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('sqlite3'\).verbose\(\);const db=new s.Database\('./tuin.db'\);db.serialize\(\(\)=>{db.run\('DELETE FROM consumos'\);db.run\('DELETE FROM pagamentos'\);db.run\('DELETE FROM barris'\);db.run\('DELETE FROM movimentacoes_barril'\);db.run\('UPDATE torneiras SET barril_id=NULL',\(\)=>{console.log\('limpo'\);db.close\(\);}\);}\);")
